accurate.why: All factual claims are supported by the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies nullification of the DOL rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: States the rule would be treated as though it never took effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this resolution.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the sole operative provision accurately.

concise.why: Appropriately brief and efficient for the resolution's content.

correct_entities.why: Department of Labor and rule title correctly named.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register date and passage dates are correct.
